seoTitle: South Gundagai vs South Gundurimba — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Gundagai and South Gundurimba. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Gundagai vs South Gundurimba: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Gundagai and South Gundurimba.
heading: South Gundagai vs South Gundurimba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Gundagai, New South Wales and South Gundurimba, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Gundagai has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to South Gundurimba (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Gundagai or South Gundurimba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Gundagai has a flood risk score of 43/100, while South Gundurimba scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Gundagai scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. South Gundurimba scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Gundagai or South Gundurimba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Gundagai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
